author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Restructuring GRU::forward. The fused kernel expects input_gates and hidden_gates WITHOUT bias (bias is added inside the kernel). Current code adds bias before splitting. I need to pass the raw matmul outputs + biases to the kernel.

Changes:
1. Hoist wih_t/whh_t transposes outside the timestep loop  
2. For GPU f32: pass xw (raw matmul) + hw (raw matmul) + bias_ih + bias_hh + h to fused_gru_cell_f32
3. For CPU/non-f32: keep the existing scalar gate logic
